name: Savory Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Create a spice blend by combining cumin (1 tsp), cayenne pepper (1/4 tsp), crushed thyme (1 tsp), garlic powder (1/2 tsp), onion powder (1/2 tsp), salt (1/2 tsp), and flour (1 tbsp).
2. Rub the chicken pieces with the spice blend and let them sit at room temperature for about 20 minutes.
3. Heat butter (2 Tbsp) in a heavy 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
4. Add 1 cup of chicken pieces to the skillet and sauté until golden, about 5-7 minutes. Remove the sautéed chicken to a plate.
5. Repeat with the remaining chicken pieces, adding more butter if necessary.
6. Return all the chicken pieces to the skillet.
7. Add chopped garlic (1 clove) and minced jalapeno chiles (2 Tsp) to the skillet.
8. Pour in light beer (1/2 cup to 3/4 cup).
9. Reduce heat to low, cover with a lid, and cook for about 15-18 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes.
10. If the liquid reduces too much, add more beer as needed until reaching a nice thick glaze.
11. Serve over tacos or your favorite dish.
Note: The recipe serves 4 people.
